report.summary: Audited today's new FOCIL learn guide for UX, produced the missing OG image, and logged programmer refinements for the static learn-page template.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Audited /learn/focil-inclusion-lists-guide-2026: static learn page with no form inputs, so no input-validation work required.
Mobile layout check: page uses existing learn-page template (Breadcrumb, StructuredData, BackToTop); inherits audited mobile rules, no regressions expected.
Recommendation: add an inline diagram callout near the 'committee size rationale' section so the 16-validator ring concept has a visual anchor on mobile where the OG image is not rendered in-body.
Recommendation: FAQ accordions default open on desktop and collapsed on mobile to reduce scroll length — matches convention used on the Fusaka/Glamsterdam guide.
Interaction pattern: confirm BackToTop appears after 600px scroll, consistent with sibling learn pages.

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-focil-inclusion-lists-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme, indigo/cyan accent gradient, 16-dot committee ring visualizing FOCIL asymmetric security; matches existing og-pectra-upgrade / og-ethereum-l2-guide style family.
Placed at /public/og-focil-inclusion-lists-guide.svg to match the filename referenced in the build cycle's metadata.
No separate social card generated — single new page this cycle; OG image doubles as Twitter card.

sections.title: Programmer Refinements
items: Verified OG metadata reference in the build report matches the newly created SVG filename — no code change needed.

Flagged for next programmer pass: extract the repeated learn-page shell (Breadcrumb + StructuredData + BackToTop + prose container) into a <LearnPageLayout/> component to cut duplication across recent guides.
No chart/animation work this cycle — FOCIL guide is prose-only per build notes.
Carry-over from publish cycle: src/lib/published-pages.ts still reported missing; flag to devops/data-engineer before next design cycle.
